name: Push / Pull / Legs
description: Classic PPL split for intermediate lifters. Each day focuses on one movement pattern. 3-6x/week.

weeks.description: Easing into the intensity in this first, introductory week of workouts.

exercises.name: Dip Machine
exercises.notes: Lean slightly forward for chest emphasis, stay upright for tricep emphasis.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Bar stays close to legs. Stop when you feel a deep hamstring stretch.

weeks.name: Deload
weeks.description: Congrats on completing weeks 1-4. Now let's give your body a chance to rest actively.
